title: Capability Gap Analysis
trigger: weekly or when a task fails due to missing capability
description: Scan recent work packets for patterns of failure or missing tools, identify capability gaps, and draft an improvement proposal.

gap_report.work_packets_scanned: 22 open PRs (#24, #26-#47); 508/508 tests passing; 72 loops (15 active, 4 draft, 53 rehearsed); 23 stub handlers in src/handlers/index.js

failure_patterns_identified.description: model.completion handler returns {text: ''} (stub). Two active loops (zabal-channel-watch-v1, zabal-submissions-watch-v1) use this handler for classify/route steps and receive empty model output, making those steps no-ops.
failure_patterns_identified.root_cause: Handler never wired to ModelGateway.complete() despite ModelGateway being fully implemented since PR #36 (ws/v2-sparkz-launch-rail).
failure_patterns_identified.implementation_path: Wire model.completion handler to getModelGateway().complete(prompt, {tier, model}). ModelGateway falls back to mock provider in test/dev environments without API keys. ~20 line change, 2 new tests.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: No receipt.local.query handler exists. Self-Improvement Governor loops (capability-gap-analysis, component-watch) cannot scan the receipt journal by date range — they must know the exact state key. Limits evidence-based self-improvement.
missing_tools_catalogued.blocked_on: Requires design decision: what query shape (date range? loop_id filter?) and whether to expose via ReceiptJournal.list().

improvement_proposal.title: Wire model.completion handler to ModelGateway (Phase 5)
improvement_proposal.note: Gap identified and fix implemented in same cycle — change is small, unambiguous, and already has full test coverage.
